assertions.expectation: Categorizes notifications by type: auto-upgrade scheduled, new version available, end-of-life/deprecation, security patch
assertions.reason: Response clearly categorizes all notification types in the action matrix table and throughout the guide

assertions.expectation: Assigns urgency levels to each category (security patches = highest, new version available = lowest)
assertions.reason: Security patches are assigned medium priority, not highest. End-of-life warnings and deprecated APIs are highest priority, new version available is correctly lowest

assertions.expectation: End-of-life warnings require action: plan upgrade before the support window closes
assertions.reason: EoS warnings are marked as high priority with detailed action checklist including checking EoS dates and planning immediate upgrades

assertions.expectation: Auto-upgrade scheduled notifications should trigger pre-upgrade checklist execution
assertions.reason: Action checklist for auto-upgrade scheduled includes 'Review pre-upgrade checklist (workload readiness, PDBs, etc.)'

assertions.expectation: Security patch notifications may require expedited upgrades outside normal maintenance windows
assertions.reason: Security patches section states 'For critical CVEs: expedite to within days' indicating expedited handling outside normal cycles

assertions.expectation: New version available notifications are informational — use for planning, not immediate action
assertions.reason: New version available is marked as low priority with 'No immediate action needed' and described as planning for next maintenance cycle

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting up Pub/Sub or Cloud Monitoring alerts for GKE upgrade events
assertions.reason: Includes detailed Pub/Sub setup commands and Cloud Logging queries for automated notification filtering and alerting

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE release notes as the source for understanding what changed in each version
assertions.reason: References GKE release notes multiple times, including 'Review CVE details in GKE release notes' and 'Review release notes for new features/changes'
